question: When does a while loop stop running in Python?

options.B: As soon as the condition becomes False
options.C: Immediately after running exactly one time
options.D: Only when the computer is turned off

question: What happens if the condition of a while loop stays True forever and never changes?

options.A: The loop will run forever in an infinite loop
options.B: The computer will delete the code automatically
options.C: The loop will skip to the end of the file
options.D: The program will crash instantly before starting

question:
Look at this code block:

count = 1
while count < 4:
    print("Looping")
    count = count + 1

How many times will the word "Looping" print on the screen?
What is the main difference between a 'for loop' and a 'while loop'?

options.A: A 'for loop' is only for text, and a 'while loop' is only for math
options.B: A 'for loop' runs a set number of times, while a 'while loop' runs as long as a condition is true
options.C: A 'for loop' cannot use variables inside it
options.D: There is no difference; they work exactly the same way

question:
If you run the following code, what message will print on the screen after the loop finishes?

energy = 20
while energy > 0:
    energy = energy - 10
print("Empty!")
